use_cases: Container for dashboard content sections with customizable styling
Feature or benefit cards in product landing pages
Information display cards in admin interfaces
Content grouping with headers, titles, and descriptions
Flexible wrapper with multiple size and variant options
ai_summary: A versatile, customizable card component with multiple visual variants (default with border, outline with hover effects, ghost with hover background) and four size options. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling, includes subcomponents for CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, and more. Features smooth 300ms transitions and clean, minimal design suitable for various UI contexts from dashboards to landing pages.
